Tech Stack

About Me

Passionate about building great products

I'm a frontend engineer with 2 years of experience specializing in React ecosystems. I've had the opportunity to build an entire company website from scratch at Jodo, create custom deep linking hooks, and even work on React modules inside a Flutter application. I love turning complex problems into simple, beautiful interfaces.

Clean Code

Writing maintainable, scalable code following best practices

Fast Performance

Optimizing applications for speed and efficiency

Problem Solver

Finding elegant solutions to complex challenges

Quick Learner

Adapting to new technologies and frameworks rapidly

Work Experience

My professional journey

A track record of building production-grade applications and delivering impactful solutions.

Jodo

Software Engineer

Mar 2024 – Present Bangalore, India

Leading frontend development for fintech products, building scalable React applications and contributing to the core platform.

Key Achievements:

  • Built entire public-facing company website from scratch using React and modern CSS
  • Developed Jodo Collect web platform for payment collections
  • Created custom deep linking React hook for URL state management
  • Implemented validation logic before API calls to reduce server load
  • Collaborated with product and backend teams for seamless integrations
  • Worked on React modules inside Flutter application

Techxonic Innovation

Frontend Intern

Aug 2023 – Feb 2024 Remote

Gained hands-on experience in modern frontend development, building responsive interfaces and learning industry best practices.

Key Achievements:

  • Built responsive UIs with React and Tailwind CSS
  • Created dynamic email templates for marketing campaigns
  • Worked on static website using Jekyll
  • Learned modern development workflows and Git practices
  • Contributed to component library development

Vivarrthana Technologies

Python & Machine Learning Intern

Sept 2022 – Oct 2022 Bangalore, India

Developed Python scripts and machine learning models for data processing and analysis, gaining strong foundation in data science workflows.

Key Achievements:

  • Developed Python scripts to automate data processing tasks, increasing efficiency by 30%
  • Worked on data manipulation using Pandas and NumPy libraries
  • Implemented machine learning algorithms: regression, classification, and clustering
  • Built sentiment analysis model for customer feedback insights
  • Presented ML project findings at internal knowledge-sharing session

BEML Limited

SAP Analyst Intern

Sept 2022 – Oct 2022 Bangalore, India

Gained comprehensive understanding of enterprise resource planning and organizational processes through SAP system analysis.

Key Achievements:

  • Conducted data validation and verification to maintain SAP data integrity
  • Documented SAP configurations, troubleshooting steps, and best practices
  • Shadowed cross-functional teams across tendering, procurement, and production
  • Learned end-to-end organizational processes from project initiation to delivery
  • Gained insights into quality assurance and customer feedback systems

Projects

Featured work

A selection of projects that showcase my skills and experience.

At Jodo

Jodo Company Website

Full production website built from scratch for Jodo fintech company. Features responsive design, smooth animations, and optimized performance.

Jekyll
Live Demo

Jodo Collect Microsite

Microsite for the Jodo Collect app - a payment collections platform. Built with focus on conversion and user experience.

Jekyll
Live Demo

Jodo JS Utility Library

A modular TypeScript utility library used across both backend and frontend services at Jodo. Includes validation helpers, date formatters, and API utilities.

TypeScript npm Unit Testing Modular Architecture

Deep Linking Hook

Custom React hook for handling URL query parameters, validating filters, and syncing state with the URL.

React URL API

Help & Support Page

Built comprehensive Help & Support detail pages inside the Jodo Collect app, providing users with documentation and troubleshooting guides.

React

Personal & College Projects

Credit Card Fraud Detection

ML system that detects fraudulent transactions in real-time by analyzing transaction patterns.

Python Machine Learning Pandas Scikit-learn

MED-Life App

Android medicine database application for pharmaceutical distributors to manage inventory.

Android Studio Java XML SQLite

Chauffeur Behaviour Recognition

CNN-based deep learning model for driver behavior recognition. Published in IJNRD Journal (2023).

Python TensorFlow CNN Computer Vision Machine learning

Traffic Signal Management System

Developed a traffic signal management system as part of 5th semester coursework using C++. The project focused on optimizing traffic flow logic and handling real-time signal transitions.

C++ Data Structures

SEA Cafe Management System

Built a database-driven cafe management system during DBMS lab using XAMPP. Implemented features for order management, inventory tracking, and customer handling with a web-based interface.

HTML CSS MySQL XAMPP DBMS
